name: Gf Red Beans & Rice with Cilantro
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked rice, white or brown
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl, combine cooked beans, rice, green onions, celery, and red sweet pepper.
2. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, whisk together oil, remaining ingredients.
3. Pour the dressing over bean mixture; toss lightly to coat thoroughly.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or up to 3 days, stirring occasionally.
(Note: The recipe has been rewritten to follow the specified format without altering the core instructions, ingredients, or measurements.)
